novel_features.name: Operator health snapshot
novel_features.description: Joins admin/system + tasks + workers + version into a single agent-readable summary
novel_features.rationale: No single authentik endpoint returns this; we aggregate locally

novel_features.name: Stale token audit
novel_features.description: Find API tokens whose owners have not used them in N days
novel_features.rationale: Requires local join of tokens table + login events not available in any single endpoint

novel_features.name: Unused application audit
novel_features.description: List applications with no successful login in N days
novel_features.rationale: Requires local join of applications + filtered events table

novel_features.name: User group flattener
novel_features.description: Recursively expand a user's group memberships including inherited roles
novel_features.rationale: authentik API returns direct groups only; we walk parents locally

novel_features.name: Flow stage map
novel_features.description: Render a flow with its ordered stage bindings as a tree
novel_features.rationale: Local join of flow_stage_bindings + stages tables
